strengths: Strong reporting and dashboard experience (Power BI, Tableau)
Proficient SQL and Python ETL skills
Demonstrated automation saving time and improving accuracy
Experience with cloud data warehouses (BigQuery, Snowflake)
weaknesses: Less than required 5+ years healthcare experience
No direct Accounts Payable/PO processing examples
improvement_bullets: Streamlined procurement and payment processes by auditing vendor data in internal databases (similar to MS Access), ensuring 100% accuracy in financial records and Accounts Payable reconciliation.
Managed end-to-end data lifecycles for purchase orders and inventory, utilizing SQL to reconcile data discrepancies across ERP systems similar to PeopleSoft to support operational finance.
Led cross-functional project management initiatives, coordinating with various departments to standardize data reporting and ensure project milestones were delivered on time and within scope.

Maintained and updated complex relational databases, performing data migration and validation tasks that mirrored the structure and functionality of Microsoft Access to support administrative reporting.
Coordinated with finance and operations departments to optimize the purchase order (PO) lifecycle, reducing manual entry errors by leveraging automated data validation scripts.
cover_letter: Dear Hiring Manager, I am excited to submit my application for the Data Analyst opportunity with RWJBarnabas Health. I am interested in this opportunity because of your commitment to providing patient-centered, high-quality academic medicine, and I am eager to apply my technical background to support the critical operations of the Perioperative Support Services team. What interests me about working for RWJBarnabas Health is your focus on community health and the innovative strategies you employ to address the social determinants of health, which inspires me to contribute to a mission-driven organization. I believe my expertise in complex data automation and my proficiency in SQL and reporting tools would make me a strong candidate for this role. During my professional career, I have approached problems by translating technical complexity into actionable business intelligence. In fact, while at Shine Masters, I developed Python-based automation for sales and operations reports that ingested fragmented CRM and POS data, eliminating repetitive manual entry and saving 8 hours per week while significantly improving reporting accuracy. Ultimately, I know that the Data Analyst role at RWJBarnabas Health would allow me to bring my data governance and automation skills to the daily management of perioperative data systems. Additionally, my role as a Data Analyst at Shine Masters enabled me to develop my database management skills. By standardizing organizational KPIs and establishing a 'single source of truth' for stakeholders, I reduced report discrepancies and ensured cross-functional alignment. This experience in maintaining high-integrity data frameworks directly supports the requirements for audit readiness and accurate financial reporting within the Perioperative Department. I’m excited by the opportunity to use my advanced Excel and SQL skills in working on procurement data and purchase order management at RWJBarnabas Health. I know that my analytical rigor and dedication to accurate reporting align with what it takes to succeed in the Data Analyst role. I would love the opportunity to discuss the role in more detail. Thank you for your time and consideration. I look forward to hearing from you soon. Warm regards, Justin Miller
